text: The type of power sockets used in Denmark are Type A and Type K. Make sure to bring an adapter if your devices use a different type.
The official currency in Denmark is the Danish Krone (DKK). Most places do not accept euros, so you'll need to exchange your money.
Copenhagen has a total of 6 metro lines that can take you anywhere in the city. It's a convenient and easy way to get around.
The weather in Copenhagen in December can get quite cold, with temperatures falling below -15 degrees Celsius. Make sure to pack warm clothing.
The official language is Danish, but English is widely spoken in Copenhagen. You should have no problem getting by with English.
The Danish word for "hello" is "hej", "thank you" is "farvel", and "goodbye" is "tak". It's always nice to know a few words in the local language!
